programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Husband and wife Frances and Shawn, who are both working professionals, have four active sons and are currently searching for their dream property that can accommodate all six family members.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Ross and Linda are upsizing their lakefront home to better entertain their growing family; touring properties with acres of land, stunning log construction, and impressive water frontage, they're searching for the perfect backdrop for memory-making.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Creative couple Aneal and Travis are searching for a lakefront home that sparks inspiration and is perfect for entertaining; from a modern-rustic retreat with a sleek kitchen and private wellness center, to a cozy cabin with vaulted ceilings and a dreamy dockside yard, to a minimalist hideaway with 250 feet of waterfront, which home will turn their vision of the perfect lake life into reality?

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: With nine kids, Abby and Wayne are looking for a home where their bustling family can truly thrive; their search takes them from a log-inspired estate on 100 acres to a modern retreat with a private community beach, and finally to a multi-level canal home designed for gathering and fun; can they find the perfect match for their lively crew?

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Kristin and Scott, who have retired early and are ready for a permanent vacation, are searching for their ultimate lakefront oasis; they tour a sleek modern home with a pool, guest house, and cozy round fireplace, an elegant estate with grand Roman columns and breathtaking lake views, and a contemporary marvel featuring custom millwork, a spa-like shower, and endless spaces to entertain by the water; which lakefront escape will be their perfect retreat?

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Jess and Jimmy are each selling their homes and pooling their resources to find the perfect place to start their life together; their tour takes them from a sleek, open-concept home built for unforgettable gatherings, to a grand lakeside bungalow where every window frames nature's beauty, and finally to a cozy island log cabin with sunlit lofts and decks made for relaxing by the water; which home can become their dream retreat?
